description_long: This object is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a triangular, delta-shaped main body. The wings are integrated into the main fuselage and extend outward with a slight backward sweep, each ending in a compact engine nacelle with a blue glow, suggesting advanced propulsion. The rear of the airplane features a prominent, glowing blue exhaust, indicating a jet or energy-based engine. The upper fuselage has a raised section, likely housing the cockpit, with angular, armored contours. The surface is predominantly metallic gray with dark blue accents, giving it a high-tech, military or sci-fi appearance. The overall design is compact and streamlined, optimized for speed and maneuverability.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with a triangular body, swept wings, and glowing blue engine nacelles, finished in metallic gray and blue.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, integrated swept wings, and dual engine nacelles with blue highlights.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the triangular profile, raised cockpit section, and prominent glowing blue exhaust at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the large blue engine exhaust and the symmetry of the wings and nacelles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the angular fuselage and glowing engine exhaust.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, delta-shaped wings with slight backward sweep and integrated engine nacelles; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into wing nacelles with visible blue exhaust glow.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; features a tailless delta configuration with no visible vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit raised above the main fuselage with angular canopy.
